title: KnockBackFFA

# KnockBackFFA
KnockBackFFA is an free for all pvp gamemode where players can knock eachother of maps(arena's). 

## Arena's
Arena's can be created using commands and a built in map switcher (with a configurable switch delay) is available.

## Kits
KnockBackFFA also offers kits this allows users to have different types of items when using a different kit. (Shop feature is in the making)

### Kit editor
All kits can be fully editted via GUI.

### Kit item Modifiers
Each item in a kit can have it's own modifiers. (For example: Infinite Modifier, BuildBlock Modifier, On kill modifier)

## Display stats
All players stats can be shown in a scoreboard. The current arena + time remaining can addionally be shown in a bossbar

## Messaging
Almost all messages can be configured. Currently the languages: English and Dutch have been fully translated if you have a translated file you can always send it in my discord.

## Storage Types
Kbffa supports file and MySql storage.
</details>
